title: Immersive Maps
description: An immersive and vanilla-friendly take on waypoints and navigation using maps!
body:
<center>

![Have you lost your way?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aefa463e41a19cd07655ba8664c60d8e9916258.png)

[![Requires the Wayfarer mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b6b77c75253f410047733f682c55ea1e8ab9378.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfarerlib)       [![Only on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1d27875b514436a46f3ec4e998d82b5a4a24b1_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-maps)
[![Available on Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d38bc0f485713a8908fc43a2f38b6fd500615ce5.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfarerlib/versions?l=fabric)     
[![Available on Neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b80a75ee7b16613b476080c51677ed4afcf5a58.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfarerlib/versions?l=neoforge)                  
[![Available on Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d38bc0f485713a8908fc43a2f38b6fd500615ce5.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-maps/versions?l=fabric)     
[![Available on Neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b80a75ee7b16613b476080c51677ed4afcf5a58.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-maps/versions?l=neoforge)

</center>

## We've All Been There.
Coordinates can be hard, so many players opt for minimap or waypoint mods to make navigation easier. The problem is, then your screen starts to look like *this*...

![Waypoint trauma.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30525e26df48e4069ab09d558bf7e465070b36ca.png)

## What's the Alternative?
Vanilla Minecraft already allows you to save locations using maps. **If you rename a banner, place it, and right click it with a map, it adds a marker to your map.**

![Vanilla map marker behavior by right clicking on a banner with a map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73b0a6ed6acb79520147286742a69ed2679df82b.png)

But maps can still be difficult to follow, so this mod **shows waypoints in-world and on the locator bar to represent the markers on your maps**, making maps useful, and keeping your immersion intact!

![Home sweet home!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a19a6ecb2530b17d66e9e656bee7604459059dde.png)
## What Does This Mod Offer?
- ### Waypoints Only When You Need Them
  > Waypoints will appear when you are holding a map, compass, recovery compass, or lodestone compass.
- ### Supports Structure Maps
  > Waypoints will also show for special markers, such as the ones for structures found in explorer and buried treasure maps!
- ### Compasses Too!
  > Compasses also show a waypoint pointing to spawn, recovery compasses for your most recent death, and lodestone compasses towards their linked lodestone!
- ### Locator Bar Support
  > Waypoints for map markers will also show on the locator bar, though this can be disabled in the config!

## Client-Side vs Server-Side
If the mod is only installed client-side, waypoints will still work for:
  - **Compasses**
  - **Recovery Compasses**
  - **Lodestone Compasses**

But it is required server-side for:
  - **Maps**

<center>

 ## Join us. Thrive.

</center>
